name: Deduction for Nonpatronage Distributions

eligibility.description: Only available to farmers' cooperatives that meet the strict exemption requirements of IRC Section 521.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Exempt farmers' cooperatives (under Section 521) can deduct dividends paid on capital stock and distributions of nonpatronage income (like interest or rental income) to patrons.
